name: 20-student mixed class
description: A full classroom-scale sample for the intended 3-20 student simulation range.

class_features.understanding_profile: full mixed classroom with multiple low, middle, and high learners
class_features.question_tendency_profile: many quiet students, several confirmation seekers, and active questioners
class_features.motivation_profile: varied motivation requiring whole-class pacing and individual prompts
class_features.misconception_profile: sign-change, inverse-operation, coefficient-division, and negative-number risks
class_features.teacher_note: Use this class when evaluating scalability and class-level summarization.
